examples: The nasty thing about a blackmailer is that his starting point is usually the truth.
The blackmailer bled him for 500 pounds.
The blackmailer had to be paid off. He was too dangerous.
He foolishly got involved with a woman who, along with her husband, turned out to be a blackmailer.
But, this blackmailer was demanding payment to be made in the cryptocurrency bitcoin, not dollars.
